<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="40"> <diagram id="sre-arch" name="Production Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="2888" dy="833" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="900" background="#ffffff" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="internet" parent="1" style="ellipse;shape=cloud;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8f9fa;strokeColor=#adb5bd;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#495057;fontSize=12;" value="Public Internet
(100K Concurrent Users)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="230" x="-30" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dns" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e3f2fd;strokeColor=#1565c0;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#0d47a1;fontSize=12;" value="Global DNS
app.jotysdevsecopslab.xyz" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="20" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vpc" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#343a40;strokeWidth=4;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 8;fontStyle=1;fontSize=18;fontColor=#343a40;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingTop=15;spacingLeft=20;" value="Controlled Network Boundary" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="820" width="1120" x="240" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="subnet_pub" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8f9fa;strokeColor=#ced4da;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;fontColor=#495057;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingTop=10;spacingLeft=15;" value="Application Tier (Internet Facing)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="730" width="400" x="270" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vm1" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;startSize=30;fillColor=#343a40;strokeColor=#343a40;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#ffffff;rounded=0;swimlaneFillColor=#ffffff;" value="VM-1 (163.61.156.56) — Application Gateway" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="650" width="410" x="290" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pgb_icon" parent="vm1" style="shape=image;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=default;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/png,;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="30" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pgb_label" parent="vm1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#e65100;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="PgBouncer Pooler
:6432 → PostgreSQL :5432
Backend pool: 200" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="62" width="250" x="110" y="328" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="docker_net" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#0288d1;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;dashPattern=4 4;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;fontColor=#0288d1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingTop=5;spacingLeft=10;" value="Docker Container Network" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="230" width="320" x="310" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nginx_icon" parent="1" style="shape=image;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=default;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/png,;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="48" x="331" y="246" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nginx_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#2e7d32;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="Nginx Reverse Proxy
worker_connections: 65535" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="210" x="390" y="246" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="laravel_icon" parent="1" style="shape=image;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=default;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/png,;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="70" x="320" y="346" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="laravel_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#c62828;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="Laravel Registration UI & API

max_connections: 500 | shared_buffers: 4GB
sync_commit: off | wal_buffers: 16MB" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="300" x="105" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rep1_label" parent="vm2" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#37474f;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;" value="Repmgrd Daemon (Cluster Health Monitor)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="280" x="105" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pg1_icon" parent="vm2" style="image;aspect=fixed;html=1;points=[];align=center;fontSize=12;image=img/lib/azure2/databases/Azure_Database_PostgreSQL_Server.svg;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="76" width="57" x="26" y="46" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rep1_icon" parent="vm2" style="shape=image;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=default;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/jpeg,;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="63" width="63" x="26" y="148.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hba_note" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e3f2fd;strokeColor=#64b5f6;strokeWidth=1;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;fontColor=#0d47a1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="PostgreSQL ACL

Hook
(Reconfigure PgBouncer to Promoted Node)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.2" y="-20" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
